Hey, I’m Evanna#Master’s student in Accounting (Intelligent Systems Track) at SUFE, graduating 2027.
Click to see my InternshipBig Four Firm — Audit, Tired

Interests#Exhibitions, evening walks, reading novels, and Honkai: Star Rail (1,000+ days and counting).
Sometimes I tinker with data analysis and fundamental vibe coding along with Claude.
title: About
